symbols.vision_description: A stylized italic or calligraphic letter resembling a capital 'G' or a digit '6' with a curved top hook and a closed lower loop, ending with a small descender flourish.
A serif numeral '6' with a curved top and closed loop at the bottom, in a classical print style. A small comma or quotation mark fragment is visible in the upper right.
A serif-style numeral '6' (or possibly lowercase 'b') with a rounded loop at the bottom and an ascending stroke curving to the upper left.
A handwritten or printed digit '6' with a closed circular loop at the bottom and a curved tail extending upward to the right.
A circle with three dots inside (two upper, one lower) resembling a face, flanked by curved bracket-like shapes on either side.
A circle containing three dots arranged in a triangular face pattern (two upper dots like eyes, one lower dot), flanked by other partial characters on left and right.

A black circle with three small dots inside arranged in a triangular pattern (two on top, one on bottom), resembling a simple minimalist face. Partial curved shapes flank it on the left and right sides.

A circle outline containing three filled dots arranged in a triangular face pattern: two dots side-by-side on top (like eyes) and one centered below (like a mouth). Partial characters visible to the left and right suggest this is part of a larger sequence.
A circle outline containing three filled dots arranged in a triangular pattern (two on top, one on bottom), resembling a simple face. A partial letter-like mark is visible at the right edge.

A circular glyph containing three small dots arranged in a triangular face-like pattern (two upper dots for eyes, one lower dot), flanked by angular hook-like shapes on either side. Characteristic of Rongorongo script from Easter Island.
A circle outline containing three small dots arranged as a face (two dots upper, one dot lower), positioned to the left of a triangular/play-button shape.
A black circle containing three black dots arranged in a triangular face pattern (two dots on top, one dot below), resembling a simple smiling face or emoticon.
A circular outline containing three dots arranged in a triangular pattern (two upper dots like eyes and one lower dot like a mouth), forming a simple smiley face or emoticon glyph.
A circular outline containing three small filled dots arranged in a triangular pattern (two dots in the upper portion, one dot centered below), resembling a simple face symbol.
A circle outline containing three filled dots arranged in a triangular pattern (two on top, one on bottom), resembling a simple face.

A circle containing three dots arranged in a triangular pattern (two upper, one lower) resembling a simple face, flanked on left and right by angular bracket-like shapes (resembling Γ and its mirror).
A circular face with two dots for eyes and a small open mouth shape in the center, flanked by mirrored '3'-like characters on either side.
